chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.S-315 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 04.12.2025 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Advocate a/w petitioner Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General ************** Through the present petition, the petitioner has approached this Court seeking protection against alleged harassment by the official respondents, purportedly at the instance of private respondents No.7 to 9. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Advocate, has filed a vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents No.7 to 9, same is taken on record. Learned counsel submits that neither the respondents caused undue harassment to the petitioner nor do they intend to do so in future. The official respondents have filed their respective statements /comments, which are also taken on record. They deny the allegations leveled against them and submit that they have neither subjected the petitioner to any undue harassment nor do they intend to do so in future. In view of the above statements, learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the instant Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of, with directions to the official respondents not to cause any harassment to the petitioner and to provide protection as and when required, strictly in accordance with law. However, this order shall not affect any inquiry, investigation, or trial already pending against the petitioner before any competent forum. J U D G E M.Ali*
